title: centropogon ayavacensis subsp. cylindricus
intro: Centropogon ayavacensis subsp. cylindricus is a plant species, also known as Ayavacensis, which belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Centropogon ayavacensis subsp. cylindricus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
